sub_mechanisms: M_1 complete graph K_N over N tokens
M_2 H heads = H edge colorings
M_3 by Ramsey theorem some monochromatic clique forced
M_4 use monochromatic path as guaranteed-coverage route
stripped_llm_application: An attention-head allocation that views H heads as H edge colorings of a complete graph K_N over the token positions; Ramsey's theorem guarantees existence of monochromatic structure; this is used as a guaranteed coverage criterion (any two tokens are connected via at least one head with bounded path length).
novelty_claim_stripped: Multi-head attention is typically analyzed empirically. The candidate uses Ramsey-style combinatorial guarantees on head allocation to ensure coverage.
